experience.title: Computer Specialist and Intern
experience.description: Wrote two programs to estimate the cost for the Panama Canal Conflict. Coordinated with QA testers for end-to-end unit testing and post-production testing. Implemented system security and data assurance software. Developed custom software solutions for the organization.

experience.title: Computer Specialist (Special Assignment)

experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
